quote: We moved from Heroku to Shipfast and cut our infra bill by 60%. The DX is better too. Deploy times went from 8 minutes to 90 seconds.
name: Camila Torres

quote: Preview branches are a game changer. Our designer reviews on the actual environment now, not screenshots. Shipping velocity doubled.
name: Mateo Aldaz

quote: I had a production incident at 2am. One-click rollback and it was over in 3 minutes. My previous setup would have taken an hour.
name: Lucia Park
